zh: 在18世纪，更简约的设计变得流行。苏格兰建筑师罗伯特·亚当（Robert Adam）影响了英国、欧洲和美国的建筑发展。他设计了如苏格兰邓弗里斯大厦（Dumfries House）等宏伟宅邸的内部装饰以及建筑本身。他的理念影响了巴斯等城市中的建筑师，皇家新月楼（Royal Crescent）便是在那里建成的。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: In the 19th century, the medieval ‘gothic’ style became popular again. As cities expanded, many great public buildings were built in this style. The Houses of Parliament and St Pancras Station were built at this time, as were the town halls in cities such as Manchester and Sheffield.
zh: 在19世纪，中世纪的“哥特式”风格再次流行起来。随着城市的扩张，许多大型公共建筑以这种风格建造。议会大厦和圣潘克拉斯车站就是在这个时期建造的，曼彻斯特和谢菲尔德等城市的新市政厅也是在这一时期建成的。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: In the 20th century, Sir Edwin Lutyens had an influence throughout the British Empire. He designed New Delhi to be the seat of government in India. After the First World War, he was responsible for many war memorials throughout the world, including the Cenotaph in Whitehall. The Cenotaph is the site of the annual Remembrance Day service attended by the Queen, politicians and foreign ambassadors.
zh: 在20世纪，埃德温·鲁琴斯爵士（Sir Edwin Lutyens）在大英帝国范围内产生了深远影响。他设计了新德里，使其成为印度政府的所在地。第一次世界大战后，他负责设计了遍布全球的许多战争纪念碑，包括位于白厅的和平纪念碑（Cenotaph）。和平纪念碑是每年举行纪念日活动的主要场所，女王、政界人士和外国大使均会出席。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Modern British architects including Sir Norman Foster, Lord (Richard) Rogers and Dame Zaha Hadid continue to work on major projects throughout the world as well as within the UK.
zh: 诺曼·福斯特爵士（Sir Norman Foster）、理查德·罗杰斯勋爵（Lord Richard Rogers）和扎哈·哈迪德女爵士（Dame Zaha Hadid）等现代英国建筑师继续在英国境内及全球范围内从事重大项目的建设工作。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Alongside the development of architecture, garden design and landscaping have played an important role in the UK. In the 18th century, Lancelot ‘Capability’ Brown designed the grounds around country houses so that the landscape appeared to be natural, with grass, trees and lakes. He often said that a place had ‘capabilities’. Later, Gertrude Jekyll often worked with Edwin Lutyens to design colourful gardens around the houses he designed. Gardens continue to be an important part of homes in the UK. The annual Chelsea Flower Show showcases garden design from Britain and around the world.
zh: 随着建筑的发展，花园设计和景观美化在英国也发挥了重要作用。在18世纪，兰斯洛特·“ Capability ”·布朗（Lancelot ‘Capability’ Brown）设计了乡村别墅周围的场地，使景观看起来自然天成，拥有草地、树木和湖泊。他常说某地具有“潜力”（capabilities）。后来，格特鲁德·杰基尔（Gertrude Jekyll）经常与埃德温·鲁琴斯合作，为他设计的房屋周围打造色彩缤纷的花园。花园继续成为英国家庭生活的重要组成部分。一年一度的切尔西花展展示了来自英国及世界各地的花园设计。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Britain has produced many great designers, from Thomas Chippendale (who designed furniture in the 18th century) to Clarice Cliff (who designed Art Deco ceramics) to Sir Terence Conran (a 20th-century interior designer). Leading fashion designers of recent years include Mary Quant, Alexander McQueen and Vivienne Westwood.
zh: 英国涌现出许多伟大的设计师，从托马斯·奇彭代尔（Thomas Chippendale，设计了18世纪的家具）到克拉里斯·克利夫（Clarice Cliff，设计了装饰艺术风格的陶瓷），再到特伦斯·康兰爵士（Sir Terence Conran，20世纪室内设计师）。近年来领先的时装设计师包括玛丽·匡特（Mary Quant）、亚历山大·麦昆（Alexander McQueen）和维维安·韦斯特伍德（Vivienne Westwood）。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: The UK has a prestigious literary history and tradition. Several British writers, including the novelist Sir William Golding, the poet Seamus Heaney, and the playwright Harold Pinter, have won the Nobel Prize in Literature. Other authors have become well known in popular fiction. Agatha Christie’s detective stories are read all over the world and Ian Fleming’s books introduced James Bond. In 2003, The Lord of the Rings by JRR Tolkien was voted the country’s best-loved novel.
zh: 英国拥有享有盛誉的文学历史和传统。几位英国作家，包括小说家威廉·戈尔丁爵士（Sir William Golding）、诗人谢默斯·希尼（Seamus Heaney）以及剧作家哈罗德·品特（Harold Pinter），均获得了诺贝尔文学奖。其他作者也在通俗小说领域闻名遐迩。阿加莎·克里斯蒂（Agatha Christie）的侦探故事在全世界广为阅读，伊恩·弗莱明（Ian Fleming）的书籍则引入了詹姆斯·邦德这一角色。2003年，J.R.R.托尔金（JRR Tolkien）的《指环王》被投票选为该国民众最喜爱的小说。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: The Man Booker Prize for Fiction is awarded annually for the best fiction novel written by an author from the Commonwealth, Ireland or Zimbabwe. It has been awarded since 1968. Past winners include Ian McEwan, Hilary Mantel and Julian Barnes.
zh: 布克奖小说奖（The Man Booker Prize for Fiction）每年颁发给来自英联邦、爱尔兰或津巴布韦的作者所写的最佳小说。该奖项自1968年开始颁发。历届获奖者包括伊恩·麦克尤恩（Ian McEwan）、希拉里·曼特尔（Hilary Mantel）和朱利安·巴恩斯（Julian Barnes）。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Jane Austen (1775–1817) was an English novelist. Her books include Pride and Prejudice and Sense and Sensibility . Her novels are concerned with marriage and family relationships. Many have been made into television programmes or films.
zh: 简·奥斯汀（Jane Austen，1775–1817）是一位英国小说家。她的作品包括《傲慢与偏见》和《理智与情感》。她的小说主要关注婚姻和家庭关系。许多作品已被改编成电视剧或电影。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Charles Dickens (1812–70) wrote a number of very famous novels, including Oliver Twist and Great Expectations . You will hear references in everyday talk to some of the characters in his books, such as Scrooge (a mean person) or Mr Micawber (always hopeful).
zh: 查尔斯·狄更斯（Charles Dickens，1812–70）写了许多非常著名的小说，包括《雾都孤儿》（Oliver Twist）和《远大前程》（Great Expectations）。在日常谈话中，你会听到人们提到他书中的一些角色，例如史克鲁奇（Scrooge，指吝啬的人）或米考伯先生（Mr Micawber，总是充满希望的人）。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Robert Louis Stevenson (1850–94) wrote books which are still read by adults and children today. His most famous books include Treasure Island , Kidnapped and Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde .
zh: 罗伯特·路易斯·史蒂文森（Robert Louis Stevenson，1850–94）写的书籍至今仍被成人和儿童阅读。他最著名的作品包括《金银岛》（Treasure Island）、《绑架》（Kidnapped）和《化身博士》（Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde）。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Thomas Hardy (1840–1928) was an author and poet. His best-known novels focus on rural society and include Far from the Madding Crowd and Jude the Obscure .
zh: 托马斯·哈代（Thomas Hardy，1840–1928）是一位作家和诗人。他最著名的小说聚焦于乡村社会，包括《远离尘嚣》（Far from the Madding Crowd）和《无名的裘德》（Jude the Obscure）。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Sir Arthur Conan Doyle (1859–1930) was a Scottish doctor and writer. He was best known for his stories about Sherlock Holmes, who was one of the first fictional detectives.
zh: 阿瑟·柯南·道尔爵士（Sir Arthur Conan Doyle，1859–1930）是一位苏格兰医生和作家。他因创作关于夏洛克·福尔摩斯（Sherlock Holmes）的故事而闻名，福尔摩斯是最早的虚构侦探之一。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Evelyn Waugh (1903–66) wrote satirical novels, including Decline and Fall and Scoop . He is perhaps best known for Brideshead Revisited .
zh: 伊夫林·沃（Evelyn Waugh，1903–66）创作了讽刺小说，包括《 decline and fall》和《Scoop》。他或许最为人熟知的是《故园风雨后》（Brideshead Revisited）。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Sir Kingsley Amis (1922–95) was an English novelist and poet. He wrote more than 20 novels. The most well-known is Lucky Jim .
zh: 金斯利·艾米斯爵士（Sir Kingsley Amis，1922–95）是一位英国小说家和诗人。他写了20多部小说。最著名的是《好运吉姆》（Lucky Jim）。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Graham Greene (1904–91) wrote novels often influenced by his religious beliefs, including The Heart of the Matter , The Honorary Consul , Brighton Rock and Our Man in Havana .
zh: 格雷厄姆·格林（Graham Greene，1904–91）创作的小说常受其宗教信仰影响，包括《问题的核心》（The Heart of the Matter）、《名誉领事》（The Honorary Consul）、《布赖顿硬糖》（Brighton Rock）和《哈瓦那特派员》（Our Man in Havana）。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: J K Rowling (1965–) wrote the Harry Potter series of children’s books, which have enjoyed huge international success. She now writes fiction for adults as well.
zh: J.K.罗琳（J K Rowling，1965–）创作了《哈利·波特》系列儿童书籍，在国际上取得了巨大成功。她现在也为成人创作小说。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: British poetry is among the richest in the world. The Anglo-Saxon poem Beowulf tells of its hero’s battles against monsters and is still translated into modern English. Poems which survive from the Middle Ages include Chaucer’s Canterbury Tales and a poem called Sir Gawain and the Green Knight , about one of the knights at the court of King Arthur.
zh: 英国诗歌是世界上最丰富的诗歌之一。盎格鲁-撒克逊人的史诗《贝奥武夫》讲述了主人公与怪物战斗的故事，至今仍被翻译成现代英语。从中世纪流传下来的诗歌包括乔叟的《坎特伯雷故事集》，以及一首名为《高文爵士与绿骑士》的诗，描写的是亚瑟王宫廷中的一位骑士。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: As well as plays, Shakespeare wrote many sonnets (poems which must be 14 lines long) and some longer poems. As Protestant ideas spread, a number of poets wrote poems inspired by their religious views. One of these was John Milton, who wrote Paradise Lost .
zh: 除了戏剧之外，莎士比亚还写了许多十四行诗（必须为14行的诗歌）以及一些较长的诗作。随着新教思想的传播，许多诗人受其宗教观点的启发而创作诗歌。其中一位是约翰·弥尔顿，他创作了《失乐园》。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Other poets, including William Wordsworth, were inspired by nature. Sir Walter Scott wrote poems inspired by Scotland and the traditional stories and songs from the area on the borders of Scotland and England. He also wrote novels, many of which were set in Scotland.
zh: 其他诗人，包括威廉·华兹华斯，受自然启发进行创作。沃尔特·司各特爵士创作了受苏格兰启发的诗歌，以及来自苏格兰与英格兰边境地区的传统故事和歌曲。他还写了许多小说，其中许多以苏格兰为背景。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Poetry was very popular in the 19th century, with poets such as William Blake, John Keats, Lord Byron, Percy Shelley, Alfred Lord Tennyson, and Robert and Elizabeth Browning. Later, many poets – for example, Wilfred Owen and Siegfried Sassoon – were inspired to write about their experiences in the First World War. More recently, popular poets have included Sir Walter de la Mare, John Masefield, Sir John Betjeman and Ted Hughes. Some of the best-known poets are buried or commemorated in Poet’s Corner in Westminster Abbey.
zh: 19世纪诗歌非常流行，诗人包括威廉·布莱克、约翰·济慈、拜伦勋爵、珀西·雪莱、阿尔弗雷德·丁尼生勋爵以及罗伯特和伊丽莎白·勃朗宁。后来，许多诗人——例如威尔弗雷德·欧文和西格夫里萨松——受其在第一次世界大战中的经历启发而创作诗歌。更近一些时期，受欢迎的诗人包括沃尔特·德·拉·马雷爵士、约翰·梅斯菲尔德爵士、约翰·贝杰曼爵士和特德·休斯。一些最著名的诗人的坟墓或纪念物位于威斯敏斯特教堂的诗人角。

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Some famous lines include:
zh: 其中一些著名的诗句包括：

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: ‘Oh to be in England now that April’s there
zh: “哦，多想身在英格兰，正值四月春光

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: And whoever wakes in England sees, some morning, unaware,
zh: 无论谁在英格兰醒来，都会在某天清晨，浑然不觉地

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: That the lowest boughs and the brushwood sheaf
zh: 看到那最低的树枝和成捆的灌木

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Round the elm-tree bole are in tiny leaf
zh: 环绕着榆树树干，已长出嫩小的叶片

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: While the Chaffinch sings on the orchard bough
zh: 而知更鸟在果园的枝头歌唱

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: In England – Now!’
zh: 在英格兰——就在此刻！”

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: (Robert Browning, 1812–89 – Home Thoughts from Abroad )

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: ‘She walks in beauty, like the night
zh: “她行走在美丽之中，宛如夜色

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Of cloudless climes and starry skies,
zh: 在无云的气候和繁星点点的天空下，

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: All that’s best of dark and bright
zh: 黑暗与光明中最美好的事物

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: Meet in her aspect and her eyes’
zh: 在她的面容和眼眸中汇聚

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: (Lord Byron, 1788–1824 – She Walks in Beauty )
zh: （拜伦勋爵，1788–1824 – 《她走在美丽之中》）

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: ‘I wander’d lonely as a cloud
zh: “我孤独地漫游，像一朵云

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: That floats on high o’er vales and hills
zh: 高高飘浮在山谷和山丘之上

heading: 4.2 Arts and culture
en: When all at once I saw a crowd,

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Christmas Day , 25 December, celebrates the birth of Jesus Christ. It is a public holiday. Many Christians go to church on Christmas Eve (24 December) or on Christmas Day itself.
zh: 圣诞节是12月25日，庆祝耶稣基督的诞生。这是一个公共假日。许多基督徒会在平安夜（12月24日）或圣诞节当天去教堂。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Christmas is celebrated in a traditional way. People usually spend the day at home and eat a special meal, which often includes roast turkey, Christmas pudding and mince pies. They give gifts, send cards and decorate their houses. Christmas is a special time for children. Very young children believe that Father Christmas (also known as Santa Claus) brings them presents during the night before Christmas Day. Many people decorate a tree in their home.
zh: 人们以传统方式庆祝圣诞节。人们通常在家度过这一天，享用一顿特别的晚餐，通常包括烤火鸡、圣诞布丁和肉馅饼。他们互赠礼物、寄送贺卡并装饰房屋。圣诞节对孩子们来说是一个特殊的时刻。年幼的孩子相信圣诞老人（也称为圣尼古拉）会在圣诞节前夜给他们带来礼物。许多人会在家中装饰一棵树。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Boxing Day is the day after Christmas Day and is a public holiday.
zh: 节礼日是圣诞节后的第二天，也是一个公共假日。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Easter takes place in March or April. It marks the death of Jesus Christ on Good Friday and his rising from the dead on Easter Sunday. Both Good Friday and the following Monday, called Easter Monday, are public holidays.
zh: 复活节在三月或四月举行。它标志着耶稣基督在受难日去世，并在复活节星期日复活。受难日和随后的星期一（称为复活节星期一）都是公共假日。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: The 40 days before Easter are known as Lent. It is a time when Christians take time to reflect and prepare for Easter. Traditionally, people would fast during this period and today many people will give something up, like a favourite food. The day before Lent starts is called Shrove Tuesday, or Pancake Day. People eat pancakes, which were traditionally made to use up foods such as eggs, fat and milk before fasting. Lent begins on Ash Wednesday. There are church services where Christians are marked with an ash cross on their forehead as a symbol of death and sorrow for sin.
zh: 复活节前的40天被称为四旬期。这是基督徒反思并为复活节做准备的时期。传统上，人们会在此期间斋戒，如今许多人会放弃一些东西，比如最喜欢的食物。四旬期开始的前一天称为忏悔星期二，或薄饼日。人们吃薄饼，传统上是为了在斋戒前消耗掉鸡蛋、油脂和牛奶等食物。四旬期始于圣灰星期三。教堂会有礼拜仪式，基督徒的额头上会被点上灰烬十字，作为死亡和对罪过悲伤的象征。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Easter is also celebrated by people who are not religious. ‘Easter eggs’ are chocolate eggs often given as presents at Easter as a symbol of new life.
zh: 非宗教人士也庆祝复活节。“复活节彩蛋”是巧克力蛋，通常在复活节作为礼物赠送，象征新生。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Diwali normally falls in October or November and lasts for five days. It is often called the Festival of Lights. It is celebrated by Hindus and Sikhs. It celebrates the victory of good over evil and the gaining of knowledge. There are different stories about how the festival came about. There is a famous celebration of Diwali in Leicester.
zh: 排灯节通常在十月或十一月举行，持续五天。它常被称为光明节。印度教徒和锡克教徒庆祝这一节日，以纪念善战胜恶以及知识的获得。关于这个节日的由来有不同的故事。莱斯特有一个著名的排灯节庆祝活动。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Hannukah is in November or December and is celebrated for eight days. It is to remember the Jews’ struggle for religious freedom. On each day of the festival a candle is lit on a stand of eight candles (called a menorah) to remember the story of the festival, where oil that should have lasted only a day did so for eight.
zh: 光明节（Hannukah）在十一月或十二月举行，为期八天。它旨在纪念犹太人争取宗教自由的斗争。节日的每一天，人们都会在八支烛台（称为menorah）上点燃一支蜡烛，以纪念这个节日的故事：原本只够燃烧一天的油，却奇迹般地燃烧了八天。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Eid al-Fitr celebrates the end of Ramadan, when Muslims have fasted for a month. They thank Allah for giving them the strength to complete the fast. The date when it takes place changes every year. Muslims attend special services and meals.
zh: 开斋节（Eid al-Fitr）庆祝斋月（Ramadan）的结束，穆斯林在斋月期间禁食一个月。他们感谢真主（Allah）赐予他们完成禁食的毅力。开斋节的日期每年都会有所变化。穆斯林会参加特别的礼拜和聚餐。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Eid ul Adha remembers that the prophet Ibrahim was willing to sacrifice his son when God ordered him to. It reminds Muslims of their own commitment to God. Many Muslims sacrifice an animal to eat during this festival. In Britain this has to be done in a slaughterhouse.
zh: 古尔邦节（Eid ul Adha）纪念先知易卜拉欣（Ibrahim）在上帝命令他献祭时，愿意牺牲自己的儿子。它提醒穆斯林对真主的承诺。许多穆斯林会在节日期间宰杀动物并食用其肉。在英国，这必须在屠宰场进行。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Vaisakhi (also spelled Baisakhi) is a Sikh festival which celebrates the founding of the Sikh community known as the Khalsa. It is celebrated on 14 April each year with parades, dancing and singing.
zh: 卫塞节（Vaisakhi，也拼作Baisakhi）是锡克教的一个节日，庆祝锡克教社区卡尔萨（Khalsa）的建立。每年4月14日，人们通过游行、舞蹈和歌唱来庆祝这一节日。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: New Year , 1 January, is a public holiday. People usually celebrate on the night of 31 December (called New Year’s Eve). In Scotland, 31 December is called Hogmanay and 2 January is also a public holiday. For some Scottish people, Hogmanay is a bigger holiday than Christmas.
zh: 新年（1月1日）是公共假日。人们通常在12月31日晚上庆祝（称为除夕）。在苏格兰，12月31日被称为“霍格曼尼”（Hogmanay），1月2日也是公共假日。对某些苏格兰人来说，霍格曼尼比圣诞节更盛大。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Valentine’s Day , 14 February, is when lovers exchange cards and gifts. Sometimes people send anonymous cards to someone they secretly admire.
zh: 情人节（2月14日）是恋人交换卡片和礼物的日子。有时人们会向暗恋的人发送匿名卡片。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: April Fool’s Day , 1 April, is a day when people play jokes on each other until midday. The television and newspapers often have stories that are April Fool jokes.
zh: 愚人节（4月1日）是人们互相开玩笑的日子，玩笑通常持续到中午。电视和报纸经常刊登愚人节玩笑故事。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Mothering Sunday (or Mother’s Day) is the Sunday three weeks before Easter. Children send cards or buy gifts for their mothers.
zh: 母亲节（或称妈妈日）是复活节前三个星期的星期日。孩子们会给母亲送卡片或买礼物。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Father’s Day is the third Sunday in June. Children send cards or buy gifts for their fathers.
zh: 父亲节是六月的第三个星期日。孩子们会给父亲送卡片或买礼物。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Halloween , 31 October, is an ancient festival and has roots in the pagan festival to mark the beginning of winter. Young people will often dress up in frightening costumes to play ‘trick or treat’. People give them treats to stop them playing tricks on them. A lot of people carve lanterns out of pumpkins and put a candle inside.
zh: 万圣节（10月31日）是一个古老节日，源于标记冬季开始的多神教节日。年轻人通常会穿上可怕的服装玩“不给糖就捣蛋”的游戏。人们给他们糖果以防止他们恶作剧。许多人用南瓜雕刻灯笼并在里面放一支蜡烛。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Bonfire Night , 5 November, is an occasion when people in Great Britain set off fireworks at home or in special displays. The origin of this celebration was an event in 1605, when a group of Catholics led by Guy Fawkes failed in their plan to kill the Protestant king with a bomb in the Houses of Parliament.
zh: 篝火之夜（11月5日）是大不列颠人们在自家或参加特别活动燃放烟花的日子。这一庆祝活动的起源是1605年发生的一起事件，当时由盖伊·福克斯（Guy Fawkes）领导的一群天主教徒企图用炸弹在议会杀害新教国王，但计划失败。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: Remembrance Day , 11 November, commemorates those who died fighting for the UK and its allies. Originally it commemorated the dead of the First World War, which ended on 11 November 1918. People wear poppies (the red flower found on the battlefields of the First World War). At 11.00 am there is a two-minute silence and wreaths are laid at the Cenotaph in Whitehall, London.
zh: 国殇纪念日（11月11日）纪念为英国及其盟国作战而牺牲的人。最初它纪念第一次世界大战的死者，该战争于1918年11月11日结束。人们佩戴罂粟花（在第一次世界大战战场上发现的红色花朵）。上午11点有默哀两分钟，并在伦敦白厅的无名烈士墓前敬献花圈。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en: As well as those mentioned previously, there are other public holidays each year called bank holidays, when banks and many other businesses are closed for the day. These are of no religious significance. They are at the beginning of May, in late May or early June, and in August. In Northern Ireland, the anniversary of the Battle of the Boyne in July is also a public holiday.
zh: 除了前面提到的节日外，每年还有其他被称为法定假日（bank holidays）的公共假期，银行和许多其他企业会在这一天关闭。这些假期没有宗教意义。它们分别在五月初、五月末或六月初以及八月举行。在北爱尔兰，七月发生的博因河战役周年纪念也是公共假期。

heading: 4.3 Customs and traditions
en:
• The main Christian festivals that are celebrated in the UK
• Other religious festivals that are important in the UK
• Some of the other events that are celebrated in the UK
• What a bank holiday is
zh:
• 英国庆祝的主要基督教节日
• 在英国重要的其他宗教节日
• 英国庆祝的一些其他活动
• 什么是法定假日（bank holiday）

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: People in the UK spend their leisure time in many different ways.
zh: 英国人以许多不同的方式度过闲暇时光。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: A lot of people have gardens at home and will spend their free time looking after them. Some people rent additional land called ‘an allotment’, where they grow fruit and vegetables. Gardening and flower shows range from major national exhibitions to small local events. Many towns have garden centres selling plants and gardening equipment. There are famous gardens to visit throughout the UK, including Kew Gardens, Sissinghurst and Hidcote in England, Crathes Castle and Inveraray Castle in Scotland, Bodnant Garden in Wales, and Mount Stewart in Northern Ireland.
zh: 许多人家里都有花园，并会在空闲时间打理它们。有些人租种被称为“小块菜地”（allotment）的额外土地，种植水果和蔬菜。园艺和花卉展览从大型国家级展览到小型地方活动不等。许多城镇设有销售植物和园艺设备的园艺中心。在英国各地有许多著名的花园可供参观，包括英格兰的邱园（Kew Gardens）、西辛赫斯特（Sissinghurst）和海德科特（Hidcote），苏格兰的克拉西斯城堡（Crathes Castle）和阿盖尔城堡（Inveraray Castle），威尔士的博德南特花园（Bodnant Garden），以及北爱尔兰的斯图尔特山（Mount Stewart）。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: The countries that make up the UK all have flowers which are particularly associated with them and which are sometimes worn on national saints’ days:
zh: 组成联合王国（英国）的各个国家都有与其特别关联的花卉，有时人们会在主保圣人（patron saint）纪念日佩戴这些花卉：

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: There are many different places to go shopping in the UK. Most towns and cities have a central shopping area, which is called the town centre. Undercover shopping centres are also common – these might be in town centres or on the outskirts of a town or city. Most shops in the UK are open seven days a week, although trading hours on Sundays and public holidays are generally reduced. Many towns also have markets on one or more days a week, where stallholders sell a variety of goods.
zh: 英国有许多不同的购物场所。大多数城镇和城市都有一个中心购物区，称为市中心（town centre）。地下购物中心也很常见——它们可能位于市中心或城镇/城市的郊区。英国的大多数商店每周七天营业，尽管周日和法定假日（bank holidays）的营业时间通常会缩短。许多城镇在一周中的某一天或多天设有市场，摊贩在那里出售各种商品。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Many people in the UK enjoy cooking. They often invite each other to their homes for dinner. A wide variety of food is eaten in the UK because of the country’s rich cultural heritage and diverse population.
zh: 许多英国人喜欢烹饪。他们经常邀请彼此到家里吃晚饭。由于英国丰富的文化遗产和多样化的人口，英国食用的食物种类多种多样。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: There are a variety of foods that are traditionally associated with different parts of the UK:
zh: 有许多传统上与英国不同地区相关联的食物：

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: England : Roast beef, which is served with potatoes, vegetables, Yorkshire puddings (batter that is baked in the oven) and other accompaniments. Fish and chips are also popular.
zh: 英格兰：烤牛肉，通常搭配土豆、蔬菜、约克郡布丁（在烤箱中烘烤的面糊）及其他配菜。炸鱼薯条也很受欢迎。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Wales : Welsh cakes – a traditional Welsh snack made from flour, dried fruits and spices, and served either hot or cold.
zh: 威尔士：威尔士蛋糕——一种由面粉、干果和香料制成的传统威尔士小吃，可热食或冷食。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Scotland : Haggis – a sheep’s stomach stuffed with offal, suet, onions and oatmeal.
zh: 苏格兰：哈吉斯——用羊胃包裹内脏、牛油、洋葱和燕麦粉制成。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Northern Ireland : Ulster fry – a fried meal with bacon, eggs, sausage, black pudding, white pudding, tomatoes, mushrooms, soda bread and potato bread.
zh: 北爱尔兰：阿尔斯特煎盘——一道包含培根、鸡蛋、香肠、黑布丁、白布丁、番茄、蘑菇、苏打面包和土豆面包的煎食。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: The UK has had a major influence on modern cinema.
zh: 英国对现代电影业产生了重大影响。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Films were first shown publicly in the UK in 1896 and film screenings very quickly became popular. From the beginning, film makers became famous for clever special effects and this continues to be an area of British expertise. From the early days of the cinema, British actors have worked in both the UK and USA. Sir Charles (Charlie) Chaplin became famous in silent movies for his tramp character and was one of many British actors to make a career in Hollywood.
zh: 1896年，电影首次在英国公开放映，观影活动迅速流行起来。从一开始，电影制作者就因巧妙的特效而闻名，这至今仍是英国的专长领域。自电影院诞生之初，英国演员便在英国和美国两地工作。查理·卓别林爵士（Sir Charles (Charlie) Chaplin）凭借其在无声电影中饰演的流浪汉角色而声名大噪，他是众多在好莱坞发展事业的英国演员之一。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: British studios flourished in the 1930s. Eminent directors included Sir Alexander Korda and Sir Alfred Hitchcock, who later left for Hollywood and remained an important film director until his death in 1980. During the Second World War, British movies (for example, In Which We Serve ) played an important part in boosting morale. Later, British directors including Sir David Lean and Ridley Scott found great success both in the UK and internationally.
zh: 20世纪30年代，英国电影制片厂蓬勃发展。著名导演包括亚历山大·柯达爵士（Sir Alexander Korda）和阿尔弗雷德·希区柯克爵士（Sir Alfred Hitchcock），后者后来前往好莱坞，并一直担任重要电影导演直至1980年去世。在第二次世界大战期间，英国电影（例如《我们服务之时》（In Which We Serve））在提振士气方面发挥了重要作用。后来，包括大卫·里恩爵士（Sir David Lean）和雷德利·斯科特（Ridley Scott）在内的英国导演在英国及国际上都取得了巨大成功。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: The 1950s and 1960s were a high point for British comedies, including Passport to Pimlico , The Ladykillers and, later, the Carry On films.
zh: 20世纪50年代和60年代是英国喜剧电影的高峰期，包括《通往皮姆利科的护照》（Passport to Pimlico）、《贼博士》（The Ladykillers）以及后来的《 Carry On 》系列电影。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Many of the films now produced in the UK are made by foreign companies, using British expertise. Some of the most commercially successful films of all time, including the two highest-grossing film franchises (Harry Potter and James Bond), have been produced in the UK. Ealing Studios has a claim to being the oldest continuously working film studio facility in the world. Britain continues to be particularly strong in special effects and animation. One example is the work of Nick Park, who has won four Oscars for his animated films, including three for films featuring Wallace and Gromit.
zh: 如今在英国制作的许多电影由外国公司利用英国的专业技术制作。有史以来商业上最成功的部分电影，包括票房最高的两个电影系列（《哈利·波特》和《詹姆斯·邦德》），都是在英国制作的。伊灵制片厂（Ealing Studios）声称自己是世界上历史最悠久且持续运营的影视制作设施。英国在特效和动画方面依然特别强劲。一个例子是尼克·帕克（Nick Park）的作品，他凭借动画电影获得了四项奥斯卡奖，其中包括三部以华莱士和格罗米特（Wallace and Gromit）为主角的电影。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Actors such as Sir Lawrence Olivier, David Niven, Sir Rex Harrison and Richard Burton starred in a wide variety of popular films. British actors continue to be popular and continue to win awards throughout the world. Recent British actors to have won Oscars include Colin Firth, Sir Anthony Hopkins, Dame Judi Dench, Kate Winslet and Tilda Swinton.
zh: 劳伦斯·奥利弗爵士（Sir Lawrence Olivier）、大卫·尼文（David Niven）、雷克斯·哈里森爵士（Sir Rex Harrison）和理查德·伯顿（Richard Burton）等演员主演了各种各样的热门电影。英国演员依然广受欢迎，并继续在全世界获奖。近年来获得奥斯卡奖的英国演员包括科林·费尔斯（Colin Firth）、安东尼·霍普金斯爵士（Sir Anthony Hopkins）、朱迪·丹奇女爵士（Dame Judi Dench）、凯特·温斯莱特（Kate Winslet）和蒂尔达·斯文顿（Tilda Swinton）。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: The annual British Academy Film Awards, hosted by the British Academy of Film and Television Arts (BAFTA), are the British equivalent of the Oscars.
zh: 英国电影学院奖（British Academy Film Awards）由英国电影和电视艺术学院（BAFTA）主办，是英国的奥斯卡奖 equivalent。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: The 39 Steps (1935), directed by Alfred Hitchcock
zh: 《三十九级台阶》（The 39 Steps，1935年），由阿尔弗雷德·希区柯克（Alfred Hitchcock）执导

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Brief Encounter (1945), directed by David Lean
zh: 《相见恨晚》（Brief Encounter，1945年），由大卫·里恩（David Lean）执导

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: The Third Man (1949), directed by Carol Reed
zh: 《第三人》（The Third Man，1949年），由卡罗尔·里德（Carol Reed）执导

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: The Belles of St Trinian’s (1954), directed by Frank Launder
zh: 《圣特雷西亚的淑女们》（The Belles of St Trinian’s，1954年），由弗兰克·劳德（Frank Launder）执导

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Lawrence of Arabia (1962), directed by David Lean
zh: 《阿拉伯的劳伦斯》（Lawrence of Arabia，1962年），由大卫·里恩（David Lean）执导

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Women in Love (1969), directed by Ken Russell
zh: 《恋爱中的女人》（Women in Love，1969年），由肯·罗素（Ken Russell）执导

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Don’t Look Now (1973), directed by Nicolas Roeg
zh: 《不要回头》（Don’t Look Now，1973年），由尼古拉斯·罗格（Nicolas Roeg）执导

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Chariots of Fire (1981), directed by Hugh Hudson
zh: 《烈火战车》（Chariots of Fire，1981年），由休·赫德森（Hugh Hudson）执导

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: The Killing Fields (1984), directed by Roland Joffé
zh: 《杀戮之地》（The Killing Fields，1984年），由罗兰·约菲（Roland Joffé）执导

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Four Weddings and a Funeral (1994), directed by Mike Newell
zh: 《四个婚礼和一个葬礼》（Four Weddings and a Funeral，1994年），由迈克·纽厄尔（Mike Newell）执导

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Touching the Void (2003), directed by Kevin MacDonald.
zh: 《险峰奇迹》（Touching the Void，2003年），由凯文·麦克唐纳（Kevin MacDonald）执导。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: The traditions of comedy and satire, and the ability to laugh at ourselves, are an important part of the UK character. Medieval kings and rich nobles had jesters who told jokes and made fun of people in the Court. Later, Shakespeare included comic characters in his plays. In the 18th century, political cartoons attacking prominent politicians – and, sometimes, the monarch or other members of the Royal Family – became increasingly popular. In the 19th century, satirical magazines began to be published. The most famous was Punch , which was published for the first time in the 1840s. Today, political cartoons continue to be published in newspapers, and magazines such as_Private Eye_ continue the tradition of satire.
zh: 喜剧与讽刺的传统，以及自嘲的能力，是英国性格的重要组成部分。中世纪的国王和富有的贵族拥有弄臣，他们讲笑话并取笑宫廷中的人。后来，莎士比亚在他的戏剧中加入了喜剧角色。在18世纪，攻击著名政治人物——有时甚至是君主或其他王室成员——的政治漫画变得越来越流行。在19世纪，讽刺杂志开始出版。最著名的是《笨拙》（Punch），它于19世纪40年代首次出版。如今，政治漫画继续在报纸上发表，《私眼》（Private Eye）等杂志继续延续讽刺的传统。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Comedians were a popular feature of British music hall, a form of variety theatre which was very common until television became the leading form of entertainment in the UK. Some of the people who had performed in the music halls in the 1940s and 1950s, such as Morecambe and Wise, became stars of television.
zh: 喜剧演员是英国音乐厅的热门特色，这是一种杂耍剧院形式，在电视成为英国主要娱乐形式之前非常普遍。一些在20世纪40年代和50年代在音乐厅表演的人，如莫卡姆和怀斯（Morecambe and Wise），成为了电视明星。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Television comedy developed its own style. Situation comedies, or sitcoms, which often look at family life and relationships in the workplace, remain popular. Satire has also continued to be important, with shows like That Was The Week That Was in the 1960s and Spitting Image in the 1980s and 1990s. In 1969, Monty Python’s Flying Circus introduced a new type of progressive comedy. Stand-up comedy, where a solo comedian talks to a live audience, has become popular again in recent years.
zh: 电视喜剧发展出了自己的风格。情景喜剧（sitcoms）通常聚焦家庭生活和工作场所的人际关系，至今仍广受欢迎。讽刺节目也持续发挥重要作用，例如20世纪60年代的《That Was The Week That Was》以及20世纪80年代和90年代的《Spitting Image》。1969年，《蒙提·派森的飞行马戏团》（Monty Python’s Flying Circus）引入了一种新型的前卫喜剧形式。近年来，单人脱口秀喜剧（stand-up comedy）再次流行起来，即由一位喜剧演员独自面对现场观众进行表演。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Many different television (TV) channels are available in the UK. Some are free to watch and others require a paid subscription. British television shows a wide variety of programmes. Popular programmes include regular soap operas such as Coronation Street and EastEnders . In Scotland, some Scotland-specific programmes are shown and there is also a channel with programmes in the Gaelic language. There is a Welsh-language channel in Wales. There are also programmes specific to Northern Ireland and some programmes broadcast in Irish Gaelic.
zh: 英国有许多不同的电视频道可供选择。有些频道免费观看，而另一些则需要付费订阅。英国电视节目种类繁多。受欢迎的节目包括常规的肥皂剧，如《加冕街》（Coronation Street）和《东区人》（EastEnders）。在苏格兰，会播出一些针对苏格兰的特定节目，还有一个使用盖尔语播放节目的频道。威尔士有一个威尔士语频道。此外，还有针对北爱尔兰的特定节目，以及一些用爱尔兰盖尔语播出的节目。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Everyone in the UK with a TV, computer or other medium which can be used for watching TV must have a television licence. One licence covers all of the equipment in one home, except when people rent different rooms in a shared house and each has a separate tenancy agreement – those people must each buy a separate licence. People over 75 can apply for a free TV licence and blind people can get a 50% discount. You will receive a fine of up to £1,000 if you watch TV but do not have a TV licence.
zh: 在英国，任何拥有电视、电脑或其他可用于观看电视设备的人，都必须持有电视执照（television licence）。一张执照涵盖一户家庭中的所有设备，除非人们合租房屋的不同房间且各自拥有独立的租赁协议——在这种情况下，每个人必须单独购买执照。75岁以上的人可以申请免费的电视执照，盲人可享受50%的折扣。如果您观看电视但没有电视执照，将被处以高达1,000英镑的罚款。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: The money from TV licences is used to pay for the British Broadcasting Corporation (BBC). This is a British public service broadcaster providing television and radio programmes. The BBC is the largest broadcaster in the world. It is the only wholly state-funded media organisation that is independent of government. Other UK channels are primarily funded through advertisements and subscriptions.
zh: 电视执照的收入用于资助英国广播公司（British Broadcasting Corporation, BBC）。BBC是一家提供电视和广播节目的英国公共服务广播机构。BBC是世界上最大的广播机构。它是唯一一家完全由国家资助且独立于政府之外的媒体组织。其他英国频道主要通过广告和订阅资金运营。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: There are also many different radio stations in the UK. Some broadcast nationally and others in certain cities or regions. There are radio stations that play certain types of music and some broadcast in regional languages such as Welsh or Gaelic. Like television, BBC radio stations are funded by TV licences and other radio stations are funded through advertisements.
zh: 英国有许多不同的广播电台。有些在全国范围内广播，而另一些则在特定城市或地区播出。有些电台播放特定类型的音乐，还有一些使用威尔士语或盖尔语等地方语言广播。与电视一样，BBC电台由电视执照资助，其他电台则通过广告资金运营。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Social networking websites such as Facebook and Twitter are a popular way for people to stay in touch with friends, organise social events, and share photos, videos and opinions. Many people use social networking on their mobile phones when out and about.
zh: Facebook和Twitter等社交网站是人们保持与朋友联系、组织社交活动以及分享照片、视频和观点的流行方式。许多人在外出时使用手机进行社交媒体互动。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Public houses (pubs) are an important part of the UK social culture. Many people enjoy meeting friends in the pub. Most communities will have a ‘local’ pub that is a natural focal point for social activities. Pub quizzes are popular. Pool and darts are traditional pub games. To buy alcohol in a pub or night club you must be 18 or over, but people under that age may be allowed in some pubs with an adult. When they are 16, people can drink wine or beer with a meal in a hotel or restaurant (including eating areas in pubs) as long as they are with someone over 18.
zh: 酒吧（pubs）是英国社会文化的重要组成部分。许多人喜欢在酒吧里与朋友聚会。大多数社区都有一个“当地”酒吧，它是社交活动的自然中心。酒吧问答游戏（Pub quizzes）很受欢迎。台球和飞镖是传统的酒吧游戏。在酒吧或夜总会购买酒精饮料必须年满18岁，但未满该年龄的人在某些酒吧可能在成年人的陪同下被允许进入。当人们年满16岁时，可以在酒店或餐厅（包括酒吧内的用餐区）随餐饮用葡萄酒或啤酒，前提是有18岁以上的人陪同。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Pubs are usually open during the day from 11.00 am (12 noon on Sundays). Night clubs with dancing and music usually open and close later than pubs. The licensee decides the hours that the pub or night club is open.
zh: 酒吧通常在白天营业，从上午11点开始（周日中午12点开始）。设有舞蹈和音乐的夜总会通常比酒吧开得更晚、关得更晚。酒吧或夜总会的营业时间由持牌人决定。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: In the UK, people often enjoy a gamble on sports or other events. There are also casinos in many places. You have to be 18 to go into betting shops or gambling clubs. There is a National Lottery for which draws are made every week. You can enter by buying a ticket or a scratch card. People under 18 (minimum age will rose from 16 to 18 from April 2021) are not allowed to participate in the National Lottery.
zh: 在英国，人们经常对体育比赛或其他活动进行博彩。许多地方也有赌场。进入投注店或赌博俱乐部必须年满18岁。英国设有国家彩票，每周开奖。您可以通过购买彩票或刮刮卡参与。未满18岁的人（2021年4月起最低年龄将从16岁提高至18岁）不得参与国家彩票。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: A lot of people in the UK have pets such as cats or dogs. They might have them for company or because they enjoy looking after them. It is against the law to treat a pet cruelly or to neglect it. All dogs in public places must wear a collar showing the name and address of the owner. The owner is responsible for keeping the dog under control and for cleaning up after the animal in a public place.
zh: 许多英国人饲养宠物，如猫或狗。他们养宠物可能是为了陪伴，或者因为喜欢照顾它们。虐待或忽视宠物是违法的。在公共场所，所有狗都必须佩戴显示主人姓名和地址的项圈。主人有责任确保狗处于控制之下，并负责清理动物在公共场所留下的排泄物。

heading: 4.4 Leisure
en: Vaccinations and medical treatment for animals are available from veterinary surgeons (vets). There are charities which may help people who cannot afford to pay a vet.
zh: 兽医（vets）可为动物提供疫苗接种和医疗治疗。有一些慈善机构可能会帮助那些无力支付兽医费用的人。

heading: 4.5 Places of interest
en: The UK has a large network of public footpaths in the countryside. There are also many opportunities for mountain biking, mountaineering and hill walking. There are 15 national parks in England, Wales and Scotland. They are areas of protected countryside that everyone can visit, and where people live, work and look after the landscape.
zh: 英国乡村拥有庞大的公共步道网络。此外，还有许多山地自行车、登山和丘陵徒步的机会。英格兰、威尔士和苏格兰共有15个国家公园。这些是受保护的乡村地区，每个人都可以参观，人们在此生活、工作并照料景观。

heading: 4.5 Places of interest
en: There are many museums in the UK, which range from small community museums to large national and civic collections. Famous landmarks exist in towns, cities and the countryside throughout the UK. Most of them are open to the public to view (generally for a charge).
zh: 英国有许多博物馆，从小型社区博物馆到大型国家和市政收藏馆不等。在英国各地的城镇、城市和乡村都有著名的地标。大多数对公众开放参观（通常收费）。

heading: 4.5 Places of interest
en: Many parts of the countryside and places of interest are kept open by the National Trust in England, Wales and Northern Ireland and the National Trust for Scotland. Both are charities that work to preserve important buildings, coastline and countryside in the UK. The National Trust was founded in 1895 by three volunteers. There are now more than 61,000 volunteers helping to keep the organisation running.
zh: 英格兰、威尔士和北爱尔兰的国家信托（National Trust）以及苏格兰国家信托（National Trust for Scotland）使许多乡村地区和名胜保持开放。这两家慈善机构致力于保护英国重要的建筑、海岸线和乡村景观。国家信托由三名志愿者于1895年创立。现在有超过61,000名志愿者帮助维持该组织的运作。

heading: 4.5 Places of interest
en: Big Ben is the nickname for the great bell of the clock at the Houses of Parliament in London. Many people call the clock Big Ben as well. The clock is over 150 years old and is a popular tourist attraction. The clock tower is named ‘Elizabeth Tower’ in honour of Queen Elizabeth II’s Diamond Jubilee in 2012.
zh: 大本钟（Big Ben）是伦敦议会大厦时钟的大钟的昵称。许多人也将这座钟称为大本钟。这座钟已有150多年历史，是一个受欢迎的旅游景点。钟楼以2012年伊丽莎白二世女王（Queen Elizabeth II）钻石禧年为名，命名为“伊丽莎白塔”（Elizabeth Tower）。

heading: 4.5 Places of interest
en: The Eden Project is located in Cornwall, in the south west of England. Its biomes, which are like giant greenhouses, house plants from all over the world. The Eden Project is also a charity which runs environmental and social projects internationally.
zh: 伊甸园项目（Eden Project）位于英格兰西南部的康沃尔郡。其生物群落（biomes）类似于巨大的温室，容纳来自世界各地的植物。伊甸园项目也是一项慈善事业，在国际上开展环境和社会项目。

heading: 4.5 Places of interest
en: The Castle is a dominant feature of the skyline in Edinburgh, Scotland. It has a long history, dating back to the early Middle Ages. It is looked after by Historic Scotland, a Scottish government agency.
zh: 城堡是苏格兰爱丁堡天际线中最显著的地标之一。它历史悠久，可追溯至中世纪早期。该城堡由苏格兰政府机构“苏格兰历史环境局”（Historic Scotland）负责管理。

heading: 4.5 Places of interest
en: Located on the north-east coast of Northern Ireland, the Giant’s Causeway is a land formation of columns made from volcanic lava. It was formed about 50 million years ago. There are many legends about the Causeway and how it was formed.
zh: 巨人堤道（Giant's Causeway）位于北爱尔兰东北海岸，是由火山熔岩形成的柱状地貌结构。它形成于约5,000万年前。关于该堤道及其成因有许多传说。

heading: 4.5 Places of interest
en: Loch Lomond and the Trossachs National Park
zh: 洛蒙德湖与特罗萨克斯国家公园（Loch Lomond and the Trossachs National Park）

heading: 4.5 Places of interest
en: This national park covers 720 square miles (1,865 square kilometres) in the west of Scotland. Loch Lomond is the largest expanse of fresh water in mainland Britain and probably the best-known part of the park.
zh: 该国家公园占地720平方英里（1,865平方公里），位于苏格兰西部。洛蒙德湖（Loch Lomond）是大不列颠主岛上最大的淡水水域，也是该公园中最著名的部分。

heading: 4.5 Places of interest
en: The London Eye is situated on the southern bank of the River Thames and is a Ferris wheel that is 443 feet (135 metres) tall. It was originally built as part of the UK’s celebration of the new millennium and continues to be an important part of New Year celebrations.
zh: 伦敦眼位于泰晤士河南岸，是一座高443英尺（135米）的摩天轮。它最初是为庆祝英国新千年而建造的，至今仍是新年庆祝活动的重要组成部分。

heading: 4.5 Places of interest
en: Snowdonia is a national park in North Wales. It covers an area of 838 square miles (2,170 square kilometres). Its most well-known landmark is Snowdon, which is the highest mountain in Wales.
zh: 斯诺登尼亚是位于北威尔士的一个国家公园。其面积为838平方英里（2,170平方公里）。其最著名的地标是斯诺登山，它是威尔士最高的山峰。

heading: 4.5 Places of interest
en: The Tower of London was first built by William the Conqueror after he became king in 1066. Tours are given by the Yeoman Warders, also known as Beefeaters, who tell visitors about the building’s history. People can also see the Crown Jewels there.
zh: 伦敦塔由威廉一世（William the Conqueror）于1066年登基后首次建造。游客可参加由御用侍卫（Yeoman Warders，又称Beefeaters）带领的导览，他们向游客介绍这座建筑的历史。人们还可以在那里看到王室珠宝。

heading: 4.5 Places of interest
en: The views that can be seen in Lake District
zh: 湖区可欣赏到的景色

heading: 4.5 Places of interest
en: The Lake District is England’s largest national park. It covers 885 square miles (2,292 square kilometres). It is famous for its lakes and mountains and is very popular with climbers, walkers and sailors. The biggest stretch of water is Windermere. In 2007, television viewers voted Wastwater as Britain’s favourite view.
zh: 湖区是英格兰最大的国家公园。其面积为885平方英里（2,292平方公里）。它以湖泊和山脉闻名，深受登山者、徒步旅行者和帆船爱好者的喜爱。最大的水域是温德米尔湖。2007年，电视观众投票选出瓦斯特沃特湖为英国最受欢迎的景色。

heading: 4.5 Places of interest
en:
• Some of the ways in which people in the UK spend their leisure time
• The development of British cinema
• What the television licence is and how it funds the BBC
• Some of the places of interest to visit in the UK
zh:
• 英国人休闲时间的一些活动方式
• 英国电影的发展
• 什么是电视执照费及其如何资助英国广播公司（BBC）
• 英国一些值得参观的名胜古迹

heading: 4.6 Religion
en: The UK is historically a Christian country. In the 2009 Citizenship Survey, 70% of people identified themselves as Christian. Much smaller proportions identified themselves as Muslim (4%), Hindu (2%), Sikh (1%), Jewish or Buddhist (both less than 0.5%), and 2% of people followed another religion. There are religious buildings for other religions all over the UK. This includes Islamic mosques, Hindu temples, Jewish synagogues, Sikh gurdwaras and Buddhist temples. However, everyone has the legal right to choose their religion, or to choose not to practise a religion. In the Citizenship Survey, 21% of people said that they had no religion.
zh: 从历史上看，英国是一个基督教国家。在2009年公民身份调查中，70%的人自认为是基督徒。比例较小的人群自认为穆斯林（4%）、印度教徒（2%）、锡克教徒（1%）、犹太人（少于0.5%）或佛教徒（少于0.5%），另有2%的人信奉其他宗教。英国各地都有其他宗教的宗教场所，包括伊斯兰清真寺、印度教寺庙、犹太会堂、锡克教谒师所和佛教寺庙。然而，每个人都有法律权利选择自己的宗教，或者选择不信仰任何宗教。在公民身份调查中，21%的人表示他们没有宗教信仰。

heading: 4.6 Religion
en: In England, there is a constitutional link between Church and state. The official Church of the state is the Church of England (called the Anglican Church in other countries and the Episcopal Church in Scotland and the United States). It is a Protestant Church and has existed since the Reformation in the 1530s.
zh: 在英格兰，教会与国家之间存在宪法联系。国家的官方教会是英格兰圣公会（在其他国家称为安立甘宗，在苏格兰和美国称为圣公会）。它是一个新教教会，自1530年代的宗教改革以来一直存在。

heading: 4.6 Religion
en: The monarch is the head of the Church of England. The spiritual leader of the Church of England is the Archbishop of Canterbury. The monarch has the right to select the Archbishop and other senior church officials, but usually the choice is made by the Prime Minister and a committee appointed by the Church. Several Church of England bishops sit in the House of Lords.
zh: 君主是英格兰圣公会的领袖。英格兰圣公会的精神领袖是坎特伯雷大主教。君主有权任命大主教及其他高级神职人员，但通常由首相和一个由教会任命的委员会做出选择。几位英格兰圣公会的主教在上议院任职。

heading: 4.6 Religion
en: In Scotland, the national Church is the Church of Scotland, which is a Presbyterian Church. It is governed by ministers and elders. The chairperson of the General Assembly of the Church of Scotland is the Moderator, who is appointed for one year only and often speaks on behalf of that Church.
zh: 在苏格兰，国教是苏格兰长老会，这是一个长老制教会。它由牧师和长老治理。苏格兰教会大会的主席称为“ Moderator ”（大会主席），任期仅为一年，并经常代表该教会发言。

heading: 4.6 Religion
en: There is no established Church in Wales or Northern Ireland. Other Protestant Christian groups in the UK are Baptists, Methodists, Presbyterians and Quakers. There are also other denominations of Christianity, the biggest of which is Roman Catholic.
zh: 威尔士或北爱尔兰没有国教。英国的其他新教基督教团体包括浸信会、卫理公会、长老会和贵格会。还有其他基督教派别，其中最大的是罗马天主教。

heading: 4.6 Religion
en: England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland each have a national saint, called a patron saint. Each saint has a special day:
zh: 英格兰、苏格兰、威尔士和北爱尔兰各自拥有一位主保圣人。每位圣人都有特定的纪念日：

heading: 4.6 Religion
en:
• 1 March: St David’s Day, Wales
• 17 March: St Patrick’s Day, Northern Ireland
• 23 April: St George’s Day, England
• 30 November: St Andrew’s Day, Scotland.
zh:
• 3月1日：圣大卫节，威尔士
• 3月17日：圣帕特里克节，北爱尔兰
• 4月23日：圣乔治节，英格兰
• 11月30日：圣安德鲁节，苏格兰。

heading: 4.6 Religion
en: Only Scotland and Northern Ireland have their patron saint’s day as an official holiday (although in Scotland not all businesses and Offices will close). Events are held across Scotland, Northern Ireland and the rest of the country, especially where there are a lot of people of Scottish, Northern Irish and Irish heritage.
zh: 只有苏格兰和北爱尔兰将主保圣人纪念日定为官方假日（尽管在苏格兰并非所有企业和办公室都会关闭）。在苏格兰、北爱尔兰以及全国其他地区都会举行庆祝活动，特别是在拥有大量苏格兰、北爱尔兰和爱尔兰血统人口的地方。

heading: 4.6 Religion
en: While the patron saints’ days are no longer public holidays in England and Wales, they are still celebrated. Parades and small festivals are held all over the two countries.
zh: 虽然主保圣人纪念日不再是英格兰和威尔士的公共假日，但人们仍然会庆祝这些节日。在这两个国家各地都会举行游行和小规模节庆活动。

heading: 4.6 Religion
en:
• The different religions that are practised in the UK
• That the Anglican Church, also known as the Church of England, is the Church of the state in England (the ‘established Church’)
• That other branches of the Christian Church also practise their faith in the UK without being linked to the state
• That other religions are practised in the UK
• About the patron saints
zh:
• 在英国实践的不同宗教
• 圣公会（又称英格兰圣公会）是英格兰的国教（即“established Church”/确立教会）
• 基督教的其他分支也在英国实践其信仰，但与国家没有联系
• 在英国实践的其他宗教
• 关于主保圣人

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Sports of all kinds play an important part in many people’s lives. There are several sports that are particularly popular in the UK. Many sporting events take place at major stadiums such as Wembley Stadium in London and the Millennium Stadium in Cardiff.
zh: 各种体育运动在许多人的生活中扮演着重要角色。英国有几项特别受欢迎的运动。许多体育赛事在大型体育场举行，例如伦敦的温布利球场（Wembley Stadium）和加的夫的千禧球场（Millennium Stadium）。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Local governments and private companies provide sports facilities such as swimming pools, tennis courts, football pitches, dry ski slopes and gymnasiums. Many famous sports, including cricket, football, lawn tennis, golf and rugby, began in Britain.
zh: 地方政府和私营公司提供游泳池、网球场、足球场、旱雪坡和健身房等体育设施。许多著名的运动，包括板球、足球、草地网球、高尔夫球和橄榄球，都起源于英国。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: The UK has hosted the Olympic Games on three occasions: 1908, 1948 and 2012. The main Olympic site for the 2012 Games was in Stratford, East London. The British team was very successful, across a wide range of Olympic sports, finishing third in the medal table.
zh: 英国曾三次举办奥运会：1908年、1948年和2012年。2012年奥运会的主要场馆位于伦敦东部的斯特拉特福德（Stratford）。英国代表团在广泛的奥运项目中表现出色，在奖牌榜上排名第三。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: The Paralympic Games for 2012 were also hosted in London. The Paralympics have their origin in the work of Dr Sir Ludwig Guttman, a German refugee, at the Stoke Mandeville hospital in Buckinghamshire. Dr Guttman developed new methods of treatment for people with spinal injuries and encouraged patients to take part in exercise and sport.
zh: 2012年残奥会也在伦敦举行。残奥会起源于德国难民路德维希·古特曼爵士（Sir Ludwig Guttman）在白金汉郡斯托克曼德维尔医院（Stoke Mandeville hospital）的工作。古特曼博士开发了针对脊髓损伤患者的新治疗方法，并鼓励患者参与锻炼和体育运动。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Sir Roger Bannister (1929–) was the first man in the world to run a mile in under four minutes, in 1954.
zh: 罗杰·班尼斯特爵士（Sir Roger Bannister，1929–）于1954年成为世界上首位在四分钟内跑完一英里的人。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Sir Jackie Stewart (1939–) is a Scottish former racing driver who won the Formula 1 world championship three times.
zh: 杰基·斯图尔特爵士（Sir Jackie Stewart，1939–）是一位苏格兰前赛车手，曾三次获得一级方程式世界锦标赛冠军。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Bobby Moore (1941–93) captained the English football team that won the World Cup in 1966.
zh: 博比·摩尔（Bobby Moore，1941–93）担任英格兰足球队队长，率队赢得了1966年世界杯冠军。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Sir Ian Botham (1955–) captained the English cricket team and holds a number of English Test cricket records, both for batting and for bowling.
zh: 伊恩·博瑟姆爵士（Sir Ian Botham，1955–）曾担任英格兰板球队队长，并在击球和投球方面保持着多项英格兰测试赛板球纪录。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Jayne Torvill (1957–) and Christopher Dean (1958–) won gold medals for ice dancing at the Olympic Games in 1984 and in four consecutive world championships.
zh: 简·托维尔（Jayne Torvill，1957–）和克里斯托弗·迪恩（Christopher Dean，1958–）在1984年奥运会上获得冰舞金牌，并在四项连续的世界锦标赛中夺冠。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Sir Steve Redgrave (1962–) won gold medals in rowing in five consecutive Olympic Games and is one of Britain’s greatest Olympians.
zh: 史蒂夫·雷德格雷夫爵士（Sir Steve Redgrave，1962–）在五届连续奥运会上获得赛艇金牌，是英国最伟大的奥林匹克运动员之一。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Baroness Tanni-Grey Thompson (1969–) is an athlete who uses a wheelchair and won 16 Paralympic medals, including 11 gold medals, in races over five Paralympic Games. She won the London Marathon six times and broke a total of 30 world records.
zh: 塔尼-格雷·汤普森女男爵（Baroness Tanni-Grey Thompson，1969–）是一位轮椅运动员，在五届残奥会中赢得了16枚残奥奖牌，其中包括11枚金牌。她六次赢得伦敦马拉松冠军，并打破了总共30项世界纪录。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Dame Kelly Holmes (1970–) won two gold medals for running in the 2004 Olympic Games. She has held a number of British and European records.
zh: 凯莉·霍尔姆斯女爵士（Dame Kelly Holmes，1970–）在2004年奥运会上获得两枚跑步金牌。她曾保持多项英国和欧洲纪录。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Dame Ellen MacArthur (1976–) is a yachtswoman and in 2004 became the fastest person to sail around the world singlehanded.
zh: 埃伦·麦克阿瑟女爵士（Dame Ellen MacArthur，1976–）是一位帆船运动员，于2004年成为单人环球航行速度最快的人。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Sir Chris Hoy (1976–) is a Scottish cyclist who has won six gold and one silver Olympic medals. He has also won 11 world championship titles.
zh: 克里斯·霍伊爵士（Sir Chris Hoy，1976–）是一位苏格兰自行车运动员，曾获得六枚金牌和一枚银牌的奥运奖牌。他还赢得了11个世界冠军头衔。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: David Weir (1979–) is a Paralympian who uses a wheelchair and has won six gold medals over two Paralympic Games. He has also won the London Marathon six times.
zh: 大卫·威尔（David Weir，1979–）是一位轮椅残奥会运动员，在两届残奥会上共获得六枚金牌。他还六次赢得伦敦马拉松冠军。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Bradley Wiggins (1980–) is a cyclist. In 2012, he became the first Briton to win the Tour de France. He has won seven Olympic medals, including gold medals in the 2004, 2008 and 2012 Olympic Games.
zh: 布拉德利·威金斯（Bradley Wiggins，1980–）是一位自行车运动员。2012年，他成为首位赢得环法自行车赛冠军的英国人。他曾获得七枚奥运奖牌，包括在2004年、2008年和2012年奥运会上获得的金牌。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Mo Farah (1983–) is a British distance runner, born in Somalia. He won gold medals in the 2012 Olympics for the 5,000 and 10,000 metres and is the first Briton to win the Olympic gold medal in the 10,000 metres.
zh: 莫·法拉（Mo Farah，1983–）是一位英国长跑运动员，出生于索马里。他在2012年奥运会上赢得了5,000米和10,000米的金牌，是首位在10,000米项目中获得奥运金牌的英国人。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Jessica Ennis (1986–) is an athlete. She won the 2012 Olympic gold medal in the heptathlon, which includes seven different track and field events. She also holds a number of British athletics records.
zh: 杰西卡·恩尼斯（Jessica Ennis，1986–）是一位田径运动员。她在2012年奥运会上赢得了七项全能金牌，该项目包括七项不同的田径比赛。她还保持多项英国田径纪录。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Andy Murray (1987–) is a Scottish tennis player who in 2012 won the men’s singles in the US Open. He is the first British man to win a singles title in a Grand Slam tournament since 1936. In the same year, he won Olympic gold and silver medals and was runner-up in the men’s singles at Wimbledon.
zh: 安迪·穆雷（Andy Murray，1987–）是一位苏格兰网球运动员，于2012年赢得美国公开赛男子单打冠军。他是自1936年以来首位在四大满贯赛事中赢得单打冠军的英国男选手。同年，他获得了奥运金牌和银牌，并在温布尔登男子单打决赛中获得亚军。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Ellie Simmonds (1994–) is a Paralympian who won gold medals for swimming at the 2008 and 2012 Paralympic Games and holds a number of world records. She was the youngest member of the British team at the 2008 Games.
zh: 埃莉·西蒙兹（Ellie Simmonds，1994–）是一位残奥会运动员，在2008年和2012年残奥会上赢得游泳金牌，并保持多项世界纪录。她是2008年英国代表团中最年轻的成员。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Cricket originated in England and is now played in many countries. Games can last up to five days but still result in a draw! The idiosyncratic nature of the game and its complex laws are said to reflect the best of the British character and sense of fair play. You may come across expressions such as ‘rain stopped play’, ‘batting on a sticky wicket’, ‘playing a straight bat’, ‘bowled a googly’ or ‘it’s just not cricket’, which have passed into everyday usage. The most famous competition is the Ashes, which is a series of Test matches played between England and Australia.
zh: 板球起源于英格兰，如今在许多国家都有开展。比赛最长可持续五天，但仍可能以平局收场！这项运动独特的性质及其复杂的规则据说体现了英国人性格中最好的一面以及公平竞争的精神。你可能会遇到一些已融入日常用语的表达，如“rain stopped play”（雨停比赛）、“batting on a sticky wicket”（在黏湿的球板上击球）、“playing a straight bat”（正拍击球）、“bowled a googly”（投出古格利球）或“it’s just not cricket”（这不合规矩）。最著名的赛事是“灰烬杯”（The Ashes），这是英格兰与澳大利亚之间进行的一系列测试赛。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Football is the UK’s most popular sport. It has a long history in the UK and the first professional football clubs were formed in the late 19th century.
zh: 足球是联合王国最受欢迎的运动。它在联合王国有着悠久的历史，最早的职业足球俱乐部于19世纪末成立。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland each have separate leagues in which clubs representing different towns and cities compete. The English Premier League attracts a huge international audience. Many of the best players in the world play in the Premier League. Many UK teams also compete in competitions such as the UEFA (Union of European Football Associations) Champions League, against other teams from Europe. Most towns and cities have a professional club and people take great pride in supporting their home team. There can be great rivalry between different football clubs and among fans.
zh: 英格兰、苏格兰、威尔士和北爱尔兰各自拥有独立的联赛，代表不同城镇和城市的俱乐部在其中竞技。英格兰超级联赛吸引了庞大的国际观众群。世界上许多最优秀的球员都在超级联赛中效力。许多联合王国的球队也参加欧洲足球协会联盟（UEFA）冠军联赛等赛事，与其他欧洲球队同场竞技。大多数城镇和城市都拥有一支职业俱乐部，人们以支持自己的主队为荣。不同的足球俱乐部及其球迷之间可能存在激烈的竞争关系。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Each country in the UK also has its own national team that competes with other national teams across the world in tournaments such as the FIFA (Fédération Internationale de Football Association) World Cup and the UEFA European Football Championships. England’s only international tournament victory was at the World Cup of 1966, hosted in the UK.
zh: 联合王国的每个国家也拥有自己的国家队，参加如国际足球联合会（FIFA）世界杯和欧洲足球协会联盟（UEFA）欧洲足球锦标赛等赛事，与世界其他国家的国家队角逐。英格兰唯一的一次国际大赛胜利是在1966年世界杯，该届赛事在联合王国举办。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Football is also a popular sport to play in many local communities, with people playing amateur games every week in parks all over the UK.
zh: 足球也是许多当地社区中流行的运动，全英各地的人们每周都在公园里进行业余比赛。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Rugby originated in England in the early 19th century and is very popular in the UK today. There are two different types of rugby, which have different rules: union and league. Both have separate leagues and national teams in England, Wales, Scotland and Northern Ireland (who play with the Irish Republic). Teams from all countries compete in a range of competitions. The most famous rugby union competition is the Six Nations Championship between England, Ireland, Scotland, Wales, France and Italy. The Super League is the most well-known rugby league (club) competition.
zh: 橄榄球起源于19世纪初的英格兰，如今在英国非常受欢迎。橄榄球有两种不同的类型，规则各异：联合式橄榄球（rugby union）和联赛式橄榄球（rugby league）。在英格兰、威尔士、苏格兰和北爱尔兰（与爱尔兰共和国组队参赛），这两类橄榄球都有各自的联赛和国家队。来自所有国家的球队参加各类赛事。最著名的联合式橄榄球赛事是六国锦标赛，由英格兰、爱尔兰、苏格兰、威尔士、法国和意大利之间进行角逐。超级联赛则是最知名的联赛式橄榄球（俱乐部）赛事。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: There is a very long history of horse racing in Britain, with evidence of events taking place as far back as Roman times. The sport has a long association with royalty. There are racecourses all over the UK. Famous horse-racing events include: Royal Ascot, a five-day race meeting in Berkshire attended by members of the Royal Family; the Grand National at Aintree near Liverpool; and the Scottish Grand National at Ayr. There is a National Horseracing Museum in Newmarket, Suffolk.
zh: 英国赛马历史悠久，有证据表明早在罗马时代就有赛马活动。这项运动与王室有着长期的渊源。全英各地都有赛马场。著名的赛马赛事包括：皇家阿斯科特赛马会（Royal Ascot），在伯克郡举行，为期五天，皇室成员出席；位于利物浦附近的安特里（Aintree）举行的国家大奖赛（Grand National）；以及艾尔（Ayr）举行的苏格兰国家大奖赛（Scottish Grand National）。萨福克郡纽马克特（Newmarket, Suffolk）设有国家赛马博物馆。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: The modern game of golf can be traced back to 15th century Scotland. It is a popular sport played socially as well as professionally. There are public and private golf courses all over the UK. St Andrews in Scotland is known as the home of golf. The Open Championship is the only ‘Major’ tournament held outside the United States. It is hosted by a different golf course every year.
zh: 现代高尔夫球运动可追溯至15世纪的苏格兰。这是一项既用于社交也用于职业竞技的流行运动。全英各地都有公共和私人高尔夫球场。苏格兰的圣安德鲁斯（St Andrews）被称为高尔夫球的故乡。英国公开赛（The Open Championship）是唯一在美国以外举行的“大满贯”赛事，每年在不同的高尔夫球场举办。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Modern tennis evolved in England in the late 19th century. The first tennis club was founded in Leamington Spa in 1872. The most famous tournament hosted in Britain is The Wimbledon Championships, which takes place each year at the All England Lawn Tennis and Croquet Club. It is the oldest tennis tournament in the world and the only ‘Grand Slam’ event played on grass.
zh: 现代网球于19世纪末在英格兰演变而来。第一个网球俱乐部于1872年在莱明顿温泉（Leamington Spa）成立。在英国举办的最著名的赛事是温布尔登锦标赛（The Wimbledon Championships），每年在全英草地网球和槌球俱乐部（All England Lawn Tennis and Croquet Club）举行。它是世界上最古老的网球赛事，也是唯一在草地上举行的“大满贯”赛事。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Sailing continues to be popular in the UK, reflecting our maritime heritage. A British sailor, Sir Francis Chichester, was the first person to sail single-handed around the world, in 1966/67. Two years later, Sir Robin Knox-Johnston became the first person to do this without stopping. Many sailing events are held throughout the UK, the most famous of which is at Cowes on the Isle of Wight. Rowing is also popular, both as a leisure activity and as a competitive sport. There is a popular yearly race on the Thames between Oxford and Cambridge Universities.
zh: 帆船运动在英国依然流行，反映了我们的海洋遗产。1966/67年，英国水手弗朗西斯·奇切斯特爵士（Sir Francis Chichester）成为首位单人环球航行的人。两年后，罗宾·诺克斯-约翰斯顿爵士（Sir Robin Knox-Johnston）成为首位不间断完成此壮举的人。全英各地举办许多帆船赛事，其中最著名的是在怀特岛（Isle of Wight）考斯（Cowes）举行的赛事。划船运动也很受欢迎，既作为休闲活动，也作为竞技体育。牛津大学和剑桥大学之间每年在泰晤士河上举行一场著名的划船比赛。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: There is a long history of motor sport in the UK, for both cars and motor cycles. Motor-car racing in the UK started in 1902. The UK continues to be a world leader in the development and manufacture of motor-sport technology. A Formula 1 Grand Prix event is held in the UK each year and a number of British Grand Prix drivers have won the Formula 1 World Championship. Recent British winners include Damon Hill, Lewis Hamilton and Jensen Button.
zh: 英国在汽车和摩托车运动方面有着悠久的历史。英国的汽车赛车始于1902年。英国继续在赛车技术的开发 and 制造方面处于世界领先地位。每年在英国举办一场一级方程式大奖赛（Formula 1 Grand Prix），多位英国大奖赛车手曾获得一级方程式世界冠军。近期的英国冠军包括戴蒙·希尔（Damon Hill）、刘易斯·汉密尔顿（Lewis Hamilton）和简森·巴顿（Jenson Button）。

heading: 4.7 Sport
en: Skiing is increasingly popular in the UK. Many people go abroad to ski and there are also dry ski slopes throughout the UK. Skiing on snow may also be possible during the winter. There are five ski centres in Scotland, as well as Europe’s longest dry ski slope near Edinburgh.
zh: 滑雪在英国越来越受欢迎。许多人出国滑雪，全英各地也有旱雪坡。冬季也可能在雪地上滑雪。苏格兰有五个滑雪中心，爱丁堡附近还有欧洲最长的旱雪坡。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: The UK today is a more diverse society than it was 100 years ago, in both ethnic and religious terms. Post-war immigration means that nearly 10% of the population has a parent or grandparent born outside the UK. The UK continues to be a multinational and multiracial society with a rich and varied culture. This section will tell you about the different parts of the UK and some of the important places. It will also explain some of the UK’s traditions customs and some of the popular activities that take place.
zh: 如今的联合王国（英国）在种族和宗教方面都比100年前更加多元化。战后移民意味着近10%的人口有父母或祖父母出生于联合王国（英国）以外。联合王国（英国）仍然是一个多民族、多种族的社会，拥有丰富多样的文化。本节将为您介绍联合王国（英国）的不同部分以及一些重要的地点。此外，还将解释联合王国（英国）的一些传统习俗以及开展的一些流行活动。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: The UK is located in the north west of Europe. The longest distance on the mainland is from John O’Groats on the north coast of Scotland to Land’s End in the south-west corner of England. It is about 870 miles (approximately 1,400 kilometres). Most people live in towns and cities but much of Britain is still countryside. Many people continue to visit the countryside for holidays and for leisure activities such as walking, camping and fishing.
zh: 联合王国（英国）位于欧洲西北部。大陆地区的最长距离是从苏格兰北海岸的约翰奥格罗茨（John O’Groats）到英格兰西南角的兰兹角（Land’s End），约为870英里（约1,400公里）。大多数人居住在城镇和城市，但英国大部分地区仍是乡村。许多人继续前往乡村度假，并从事徒步、露营和钓鱼等休闲活动。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en:
• London
• Birmingham
• Liverpool
• Leeds
• Sheffield

• Manchester
• Bradford
• Newcastle Upon Tyne
• Plymouth
• Southampton

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en:

en:

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: • Belfast
zh: • 贝尔法斯特

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: The capital city of the UK is London
zh: 联合王国（英国）的首都是伦敦。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: Scotland
zh: 苏格兰

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: The capital city of Scotland is Edinburgh
zh: 苏格兰的首府是爱丁堡。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: Wales The capital city of Wales is Cardiff
zh: 威尔士 威尔士的首府是加的夫。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: Northern Ireland
zh: 北爱尔兰

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: The capital city of Northern Ireland is Belfast
zh: 北爱尔兰的首府是贝尔法斯特。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: The currency in the UK is the pound sterling (symbol £). There are 100 pence in a pound. The denominations (values) of currency are:
zh: 英国的货币是英镑（符号£）。一英镑等于100便士。货币的面额（价值）为：

heading: 4.8 The UK today
zh:
• 硬币：1便士、2便士、5便士、10便士、20便士、50便士、1英镑和2英镑
• 纸币：5英镑、10英镑、20英镑、50英镑。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: Northern Ireland and Scotland have their own banknotes, which are valid everywhere in the UK. However, shops and businesses do not have to accept them.
zh: 北爱尔兰和苏格兰有自己发行的纸币，这些纸币在整个英国境内均有效。然而，商店和企业没有义务接受它们。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: There are many variations in language in the different parts of the UK. The English language has many accents and dialects. In Wales, many people speak Welsh – a completely different language from English – and it is taught in schools and universities. In Scotland, Gaelic (again, a different language) is spoken in some parts of the Highlands and Islands, and in Northern Ireland some people speak Irish Gaelic.
zh: 英国的不同地区在语言方面存在许多差异。英语有许多口音和方言。在威尔士，许多人说威尔士语——这是一种与英语完全不同的语言——并在学校和大学中教授。在苏格兰，盖尔语（同样是一种不同的语言）在部分高地和岛屿地区使用；在北爱尔兰，有些人说爱尔兰盖尔语。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: The table below shows how the population of the UK has changed over time.
zh: 下表显示了联合王国（英国）人口随时间的变化情况。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: Population growth in the UK
zh: 联合王国（英国）的人口增长

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en:
• Year — Population
• 1600 — Just over 4 million
• 1700 — 5 million
• 1801 — 8 million
• 1851 — 20 million
• 1901 — 40 million
• 1951 — 50 million
• 1998 — 57 million
• 2005 — Just under 60 million
• 2010 — Just over 62 million
• 2022 — Estimated 67.6 million

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: Source: National Statistics
zh: 来源：国家统计署

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: In Scotland, Gaelic is spoken in some parts of the Highlands and Islands, and in Northern Ireland some people speak Irish Gaelic.
zh: 在苏格兰，盖尔语在苏格兰高地和岛屿的一些地区使用；在北爱尔兰，有些人说爱尔兰盖尔语。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: Population growth has been faster in more recent years. Migration into the UK and longer life expectancy have played a part in population growth.
zh: 近年来人口增长较快。移民进入联合王国（英国）以及预期寿命延长都对人口增长有所贡献。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: The population is very unequally distributed over the four parts of the UK. England more or less consistently makes up 84% of the total population, Wales around 5%, Scotland just over 8% and Northern Ireland less than 3%.
zh: 人口在联合王国（英国）的四个构成国之间分布极不均衡。英格兰的人口大致稳定占总人口的84%，威尔士约占5%，苏格兰略高于8%，北爱尔兰则不到3%。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: People in the UK are living longer than ever before. This is due to improved living standards and better health care. There are now a record number of people aged 85 and over. This has an impact on the cost of pensions and health care.
zh: 联合王国（英国）的人均寿命比以往任何时候都长。这得益于生活水平的提高和医疗保健的改善。目前，85岁及以上的人口数量创历史新高。这对养老金和医疗保健的成本产生了影响。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: The UK population is ethnically diverse and changing rapidly, especially in large cities such as London. It is not always easy to get an exact picture of the ethnic origin of all the population. There are people in the UK with ethnic origins from all over the world. In surveys, the most common ethnic description chosen is white, which includes people of European, Australian, Canadian, New Zealand and American descent. Other significant groups are those of Asian, black and mixed descent.
zh: 联合王国（英国）的人口具有种族多样性且变化迅速，尤其是在伦敦等大型城市。要准确掌握所有人口的种族背景并非总是容易的事。联合王国（英国）有来自世界各地不同种族背景的人。在调查中，最常见的种族描述是白人，包括具有欧洲、澳大利亚、加拿大、新西兰和美国血统的人。其他重要群体包括亚裔、黑人和混血后裔。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: Within the UK, it is a legal requirement that men and women should not be discriminated against because of their gender or because they are, or are not, married. They have equal rights to work, own property, marry and divorce. If they are married, both parents are equally responsible for their children.
zh: 在联合王国（英国），法律要求不得因性别或婚姻状况（已婚或未婚）而对男女进行歧视。他们在就业、拥有财产、结婚和离婚方面享有平等权利。如果已婚，父母双方对子女负有同等责任。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: Women in Britain today make up about half of the workforce. On average, girls leave school with better qualifications than boys. More women than men study at university.
zh: 当今英国女性约占劳动力的一半。平均而言，女孩毕业时获得的学历优于男孩。上大学的女性人数多于男性。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: Employment opportunities for women are much greater than they were in the past. Women work in all sectors of the economy, and there are now more women in high-level positions than ever before, including senior managers in traditionally male-dominated occupations. Alongside this, men now work in more varied jobs than they did in the past.
zh: 女性的就业机会比过去大大增加。女性在经济的各个部门工作，如今担任高层职位的女性数量前所未有，包括在传统上由男性主导的职业中担任高级管理职务。与此同时，男性现在从事的工作也比过去更加多样化。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en: It is no longer expected that women should stay at home and not work. Women often continue to work after having children. In many families today, both partners work and both share responsibility for childcare and household chores.
zh: 人们不再期望女性待在家里而不工作。女性在生育后通常继续工作。在当今许多家庭中，夫妻双方都工作，并共同承担照顾孩子和家务的责任。

heading: 4.8 The UK today
en:
• The capital cities of the UK
• What languages other than English are spoken in particular parts of the UK
• How the population of the UK has changed
• That the UK is an equal society and ethnically diverse
• The currency of the UK
